Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significantly elevated creatinine in both serum and blood, indicating impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals marked proteinuria, elevated microalbumin/creatinine ratio, bilirubinuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, all supporting renal dysfunction, possibly nephrotic syndrome or advanced kidney disease. Blood glucose and HbA1c are low, excluding diabetes as a cause. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation for further assessment and management.
